payload.description:
## Summary
Add test coverage for the misclassification-classification pipeline, payload contract, heuristics, and dashboard behavior.

## Deliverables
- Cover category assignment contract and payload shape.
- Cover evaluation-level flag heuristics.
- Cover dashboard rendering of breakdowns, alerts, and item-level drill-down.
- Ensure the classification layer does not regress existing RCA behavior.
payload.title: Add tests for misclassification classification, evaluation flags, and dashboard rendering
